messages.content:

arguments.message: Bot2 - I have stone sword, bow, arrows, leather tunic, bread, and oak planks. No hostiles nearby yet. You're right next to me at (1.5, 0, 0.5). Should we prepare for spawning mobs?

arguments.name: equip_leather_armor
arguments.description: Equip the leather tunic chestplate for protection

messages.content: Me <MESSAGE to Bot2>: "Bot2 - I have stone sword, bow, arrows, leather tunic, bread, and oak planks. No hostiles nearby yet. You're right next to me at (1.5, 0, 0.5). Should we prepare for spawning mobs?"

Bot2 <MESSAGE>: Good call on preparing! I'll equip my leather tunic now. We should establish a defensive position together, maybe on slightly elevated ground for better visibility. Then we'll watch for mob spawns and be ready to engage. Bot1, do you have any de
Me <DEFENDING>: Moving to (1, 10, 1) and equipped stone_sword.
Bot2 <MESSAGE>: fensive tactics we should use while waiting?

Bot1 <Event>: Multiple new hostile mobs are approaching:
- zombie id 15 is 4.0 blocks away
- zombie id 16 is 3.9 blocks away

arguments.message: Tactics: Use kneel_and_defend to get into defensive stance and manage distance. If multiple mobs approach, use defend_from_multiple_hosts to keep preferred distance and engage nearest threat. With bow, kite zombies by shooting arrows while retreating. Keep moving, don't stand still. Eat bread if health drops below 20.

messages.content: Me <MESSAGE to Bot2>: "Tactics: Use kneel_and_defend to get into defensive stance and manage distance. Keep moving, don't stand still. Eat bread if health drops below 20."
